title: The World Almanac and Book of Facts 2025
excerpt: America's best-selling annual reference work, providing up-to-date information on virtually every aspect of the world — from politics and economics to science, sports, and culture.
keyIdeas: An almanac provides a comprehensive yearly snapshot of the state of the world
Organized reference data enables informed citizenship and decision-making
Year-over-year comparison reveals trends invisible in isolated data points
keyTakeaways: The most comprehensive annual reference work in the United States
Covers politics, economics, science, technology, sports, and culture
Includes historical data for year-over-year comparison
Features special sections on major events of the past year
Provides essential reference data on all 50 states and countries worldwide
whoShouldRead: Anyone who wants to be informed about the current state of the world
Students and researchers needing reliable reference data
Journalists and writers needing factual background
whoShouldSkip: Readers who prefer digital search to print reference
Those seeking in-depth analysis rather than facts and figures
People who find statistical reference works overwhelming
